textByHash.17b3fad053226d097c20676347d021c9f7f3c5ba: Ah, you'll be wanting to talk to him then.
textByHash.2011275be8727a628cf24f6728734b66945a5efe: Aye, to be sure! The Skillcape of Agility be the symbol of the master of dexterity! Providing weight reduction, one who wears it can climb like a cat, run like the wind and jump like...err, well, jump like a jumping thing!
textByHash.2b8b1453119c0f3dd8aa67afdced447a12c0d794: It made me list, I were that excited!
textByHash.3667c1a4206710c9cac907d116b02dad330cf2f2: I were diggin for buried treasure when I found it! Amazed I was! It was a sight to behold!
textByHash.3ed43479c513096554bf10721793cf7344c2d53e: Ye receive tickets for tagging more than one pillar in a row. So ye won't get a ticket from the first pillar but ye will for every platform ye tag in a row after that.
textByHash.479af02cd99570853aa8733a216ac49b8d478ce8: A word of warning me hearty! There are dangerous traps down there!
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.82673997a0fa763a380b0c6ef98c88bd4f6fad18: May the wind be in ye sails!
textByHash.85955c8477b216b5f1df2753b24e8cbe5e3b327b: Now, be there anything else ye'd like to know?
textByHash.865d4367b745d6a683c0b6c2b4e4eff0eeefb38f: Excellent! That cape really does suit you.
textByHash.9b9b7f1f3f31437c5a024ea7b6388d69bbf1fedb: It were the biggest thing I'd ever seen! It must've been at least a league from side to side!
textByHash.ab86d2bb4e0f9b83f56cad68d2d5e95833b06391: Well, me hearty, it's simple. Ye can cross between two platforms by using the traps or obstacles strung across 'em. Try and make your way to the pillar that is indicated by the flashing arrow.
textByHash.be7d14569968142b343e292c54b9d844e27161ea: Most certainly, having it equipped reduces your weight and I think it will really suit you. All that remains to be done is pay me 99000 gold!
textByHash.c528d59e7a1757d3b595e81345d5a2556037780f: Can I help you with something?
textByHash.c64582fa89ada84e44977e0be2d49c089da34f95: Don't mind me parrot, he's Cracked Jenny's Tea Cup!
textByHash.ccc49d5828ddabef72a3623e21a1ae73cc2ea8fb: I'd found a huge cave with all these platforms. I reckon it be an ancient civilisation that made it. I had to be mighty careful as there was these traps everywhere! Dangerous it was!
textByHash.eee743c72de487c906a5f85b21c817e64e6d4eb7: This, me hearty, is the entrance to the Brimhaven Agility Arena!
textByHash.f7fe7724a883a9132a40b76671587b13fe4809a8: If ye miss a platform ye will miss out on the next ticket so try and get every platform you can! When ye be done, take the tickets to Jackie over there and she'll exchange them for more stuff!
textByHash.f82b85d8da495985e2cbec0e5b85afd62cd0cfc3: So sad, too bad. Go and pickpocket some wealthy people and come back here once you're richer.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
